ARNAV MAHADESHWAR

Software Engineer — AI & Full-Stack

Pune, Maharashtra, India | +91-9307837323 | amahadeshwar627@gmail.com

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/arnav-mahadeshwar-0993 | GitHub: github.com/arnav-mahadeshwar

Professional Summary

Software engineer with 1.5+ years of experience building production systems across artificial intelligence (AI), full-stack development, and cloud infrastructure. Shipped Large Language Model (LLM)-powered workflows, WhatsApp Business API integrations, and Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) pipelines at a FinTech serving 100K+ customers and a textile-recycling startup operating 6 factory units. Strengths: Python, TypeScript, Next.js, AWS, Docker, and applied Machine Learning (ML).

Core Competencies

Languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Bash

Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, TanStack Query, HTML5 / CSS3

AI & ML: Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangGraph, n8n, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision

Cloud & DevOps: AWS (S3, EC2, Textract, Secrets Manager), Docker, CI/CD Pipelines, Linux Administration, Git / GitHub, Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

Data & Backend: PostgreSQL, Supabase, REST APIs, Google Apps Script, WhatsApp Business API

Work Experience

Full-Stack Developer — MuddleArt Private Limited

April 2026 – Present | Pune, India (Remote)

Sole engineer for India's first formal, tech-enabled pre-consumer textile waste recycler operating 6 factory units across Gujarat, Delhi, and Uttar Pradesh.

  • Architected a serverless backend (Google Apps Script) with a webhook gateway, role-based dispatch engine, and scheduled cron jobs orchestrating daily logistics across 6 factory units, eliminating [X hours/week] of manual coordination
  • Integrated Meta WhatsApp Business API for interactive button-based approvals and template messaging across 4 operational teams (logistics, transport, bags, labour), processing [N] messages per month
  • Built the Next.js partner portal (Tailwind CSS, TanStack Query, Chart.js) with a token-gated live dashboard, material breakdown, and collective impact tracking
  • Engineered a 3-stage data pipeline (Staging → Confirmation → Master Ledger) with nightly archival and automated environmental impact reporting (CO2 avoided, water saved, employment generated)

AI & ML Engineering Intern — Poonawalla Fincorp

August 2025 – February 2026 | Pune, India

Built AI-driven underwriting infrastructure and automated testing pipelines for the Credit A.I. and Saarthi A.I. platforms at a Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) serving 100K+ customers.

Credit A.I. — AI Underwriting Platform

  • Deployed end-to-end CI/CD pipelines using Docker and YAML configuration, reducing manual deployment overhead by 70%
  • Authored Shell automation scripts syncing bulk data migrations between UAT and Production environments on AWS S3 (50GB+ per cycle), cutting operational latency by 90%
  • Collaborated with underwriting teams to launch an Educational Loan product through rapid iterative testing over a 3-month production track
  • Provisioned and managed Linux virtual machine (VM) environments supporting User Acceptance Testing (UAT) for 3 concurrent workstreams

Saarthi A.I. — Cohort Analytics & Chatbot

  • Served as infrastructure single point of contact (SPOC) for Red Hat Linux, resolving VM resource constraints to maintain 99% uptime
  • Architected cohort analysis pipelines correlating customer bounce rates with population density metrics for product teams
  • Stress-tested and hardened 15+ REST API endpoints via Postman validation with zero resulting production security incidents
  • Built log extraction routines parsing 500+ historical customer profiles to generate data-lifecycle insights for executive leadership

Projects

OmniForge 5E — Real-Time D&D Companion Platform

March 2026 – Present | Next.js 14, Supabase, PostgreSQL, TypeScript, WebSockets

  • Designed a multi-tenant PostgreSQL schema (9+ migrations) with full Row-Level Security (RLS) for campaigns, compendium, and character data
  • Built a 29-rule parser engine extracting structured automation hooks from unstructured rules text, plus an active-effect dependency graph computing armor class, saves, and skill modifiers in real time
  • Implemented an admin ingestion pipeline for spells, monsters, items, and class data via JSON

Resume-as-Code — This Resume's Build Pipeline

July 2026 – Present | Python, Jinja2, YAML, CSS @media print, GitHub Actions, CI/CD

  • Built the pipeline that generates this document: a single resume.yaml source of truth compiled by Python/Jinja2 into two render targets — an interactive terminal-themed web resume and an ATS-optimized print document — deployed automatically to GitHub Pages on every git push
  • Engineered a dual-face stylesheet where one DOM renders as a dark terminal UI on screen and re-flows into a two-column print layout via CSS display:contents and flexbox ordering, with a text layer verified against ATS parsing (linear extraction order, complete dates, zero clipping)

AI-Driven Speech Therapy Platform

January 2025 – June 2025 | Seq2Seq, BiLSTM + Attention, Gemini API, MFCC / Log-Mel

  • Engineered automated speech articulation analysis used by 200+ language learners, driving a 30% improvement in measured pronunciation outcomes
  • Implemented Sequence-to-Sequence (Seq2Seq) models with Bidirectional LSTM (BiLSTM) and attention mechanisms to classify phonetic errors at 87% accuracy
  • Integrated Gemini LLM to generate personalized practice material targeting each user's error profile
